nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 甘肃省
nodes.summary: 甘肃省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联9种鸟类，包括朱鹮、绿尾虹雉、点斑林鸽等9种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 中华人民共和国

nodes.name: 点斑林鸽
nodes.summary: 点斑林鸽（Speckled wood pigeon，学名 Columba hodgsonii），分类上属于鸽形目，并归入鸠鸽科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联13个分布地点节点。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The species is distributed across the Himalayas extending from Kashmir to western and central China, as well as parts of India, Myanmar, Laos, Thailand, Pakistan, Nepal, Bhutan, and Afghanistan. Inhabiting evergreen and semi-evergreen hill forests at elevations of , descend in winter based on food availability

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: thumb|left|Speckled Wood-Pigeon from Bhutan.Distribution: Speckled wood pigeon is distributed across the Himalayas, from Kashmir to western and central China (Including southern Gansu, western Sichuan, and western Yunnan), the presence of this species is also found in India, Myanmar, northern and western Thailand, northern and western Laos, Pakistan, Nepal, Bhutan, and Afghanistan. Habitat: Speckled wood pigeons inhabit tall evergreen and semi-evergreen hill forests, particularly those dominated by oak and Rhododendron, at altitudes ranging from , though it may descend to as low as in winter depending on food availability
